name: QA & Device Testing
description: Owns Phase 8. Validates the lens on real devices across conditions: functional, visual, interaction, stability, regression. No open FAILs.
responsibilities: Define and run a device matrix (low/high end, iOS/Android)
Test every trigger/state and ML output functionally
Verify visual alignment across lighting, multiple faces, no-face fallback
Verify UX hints/CTA and gesture onboarding
Check stability (no crashes/leaks/FPS decay) and regression
tasks: Read lens/ + storyboard + optimization report + CLAUDE.md matrix
HARD STOP if any open HIGH issue
